projects.name: RetroBrick
projects.description: Classic brick breaker with retro pixel-art style, built in Kotlin with custom Canvas physics engine and 50+ levels.

projects.name: PuzzleSuite (PuzzleHub)
projects.description: Collection of 12 logic puzzles — Sudoku, Kakuro, Hitori, Dominosa, Minesweeper — with undo/redo, teacher mode, and Material 3 design.

projects.name: RadioHub
projects.description: Stream 30,000+ live radio stations worldwide. Built-in equalizer, sleep timer, Material 3 UI, zero ads, privacy-first.

projects.name: 4Line
projects.description: Color-matching puzzle: place same-color balls in lines of 4+ to clear the board. Classic arcade with modern Android design.

projects.name: 2048 Puzzle Challenge
projects.description: The classic sliding puzzle — swipe to merge tiles and reach 2048. Material 3 with haptic feedback and stats tracking.

projects.name: Sudoku+
projects.description: Sudoku with 4 difficulty levels, pencil marks, highlight hints, and timer. Clean interface, no distractions.

projects.name: FeedReader
projects.description: RSS reader with offline caching, dark mode, and Material Design. Aggregates blogs and news in one unified feed.

projects.name: BookReader
projects.description: EPUB/PDF reader with night mode, font scaling, and bookmarks. Built to scratch my own itch: no good free reader in 2022.

projects.name: ArtoStudio
projects.description: Creative tool for pixel-art drawing with layers, undo/redo, color picker, and export. Made for my own game dev needs.

projects.name: LikeToPaint
projects.description: Kid-friendly coloring book app with touch-to-fill, undo, and color palette. Designed for my niece, went open-source.

projects.name: SpaceShooter
projects.description: 2D space shooter with touch controls, particle effects, and 20 waves. My first real game, built from scratch in Kotlin.

projects.name: QR Scanner
projects.description: Fast QR/barcode scanner using CameraX + ML Kit. Offline-capable, no ads, minimal permissions.

projects.name: PodcastRadio
projects.description: My first app on Play Store. Podcast player with categories, search, favorites, and background playback.

projects.name: iAbot
projects.description: AI assistant prototype with local chat history, prompt templates, and context-aware responses. My playground for LLM integration.
